title.emphasis: A Unified Framework for Analyzing a Cooperative Security

section.para: Preamble: This document provides a formal, unified framework for analyzing any proposed cooperative security. It integrates the Supreme Court's primary tests for defining a security (Reves and Howey) with the core operational pillars of Subchapter T. This allows for a robust, step-by-step analysis of whether a cooperative instrument should be treated as a security and, if so, whether its design is compliant and safe for the cooperative.
